{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphic / Digital Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Costarchem Nigeria is a world leader in the delivery of tailored constructive solutions for virtually any type of construction project, combining high-quality products, expert technical support, customer service and innovation. Costar Building Product system has been producing innovative construction chemicals that help gives strength and increase the life span of a modern building.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic&nbsp;/ Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking for a&nbsp;creative and results-driven Graphics / Digital Marketing Executive to enhance the company&rsquo;s brand presence and drive digital engagement
	. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing visually compelling content and executing effective digital marketing strategies to promote the company&rsquo;s products and services.


Key Responsibilities


	Design high-quality graphics for marketing campaigns, social media, website, and promotional materials
	Develop and manage digital marketing campaigns across platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, Google Ads, etc.)
	Create engaging content (graphics, short videos, and copy) aligned with brand identity
	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s social media presence
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using relevant tools (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, etc.)
	Collaborate with sales and product teams to support marketing initiatives
	Maintain brand consistency across all digital and print materials
	Support website updates and content management
	Stay updated with digital marketing trends and competitor activities


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Graphic Design, or related field
	4-6 years of proven experience in graphic design and digital marketing
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, Canva, etc.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools (SEO, SEM, social media ads, email marketing)
	Experience with video editing tools is an added advantage
	Good understanding of branding and visual storytelling
	Strong communication and content writing skills.


Key Competencies:


	Creativity and attention to detail
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Analytical mindset with data-driven decision-making ability
	Team player with good interpersonal skills.


Method of Applictaion&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;hr@costarchem.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Graphics / Digital Marketing Executive Application&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

  },

Graphic / Digital Marketing Executive Job at Costarchem Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Costarchem Nigeria is a world leader in the delivery of tailored constructive solutions for virtually any type of construction project, combining high-quality products, expert technical support, customer service and innovation. Costar Building Product system has been producing innovative construction chemicals that help gives strength and increase the life span of a modern building.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic / Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking for a creative and results-driven Graphics / Digital Marketing Executive to enhance the company’s brand presence and drive digital engagement
	. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing visually compelling content and executing effective digital marketing strategies to promote the company’s products and services.


Key Responsibilities


	Design high-quality graphics for marketing campaigns, social media, website, and promotional materials
	Develop and manage digital marketing campaigns across platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, Google Ads, etc.)
	Create engaging content (graphics, short videos, and copy) aligned with brand identity
	Manage and grow the company’s social media presence
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using relevant tools (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, etc.)
	Collaborate with sales and product teams to support marketing initiatives
	Maintain brand consistency across all digital and print materials
	Support website updates and content management
	Stay updated with digital marketing trends and competitor activities


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Graphic Design, or related field
	4-6 years of proven experience in graphic design and digital marketing
	Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, Canva, etc.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools (SEO, SEM, social media ads, email marketing)
	Experience with video editing tools is an added advantage
	Good understanding of branding and visual storytelling
	Strong communication and content writing skills.


Key Competencies:


	Creativity and attention to detail
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Analytical mindset with data-driven decision-making ability
	Team player with good interpersonal skills.


Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Graphics / Digital Marketing Executive Application" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist",
  "description": "The Law Crest LLP (&ldquo;the Firm&rdquo;) constantly provides legal, consulting and advisory services on energy matters in the upstream, midstream and downstream sectors of the energy industry. The Firm is at the fore-front of negotiating and drafting exploration and production contracts and joint ventures, obtaining necessary consents for acquisitions and transfers of interests as well as the creation of charges over oil and gas assets. We have also developed considerable expertise negotiating and preparing gas and petroleum products purchase and sales agreements and related contracts.

Our Firm&rsquo;s services are also engaged for the preparation and review of service agreements; agreements for lease of vessels, tugboats and house boats; agreements for the lease of tank farms; anchor handling tug supply (AHTS) agreements; joint venture agreements; through-put lease agreements and gas purchase agreements amongst others.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Suite 16 Extension, Jinifa Plaza Central Business District FCT,&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

JJob Summary


	We are seeking a professional and personable Receptionist to serve as the first point of contact for our Abuja office.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing front desk operations, handling communications, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day office activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to clients and visitors in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and general inquiries
	Maintain the reception area, entire office to ensure it is clean, tidy and presentable
	Schedule appointments and manage meeting room bookings
	Handle incoming and outgoing correspondence and deliveries
	Provide administrative support to staff as required
	Maintain office records and basic documentation.


Requirements


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any relevant field
	Proven experience in a receptionist or front desk role is an advantage
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications
	Professional appearance and attitude
	Must reside in close proximity to the Abuja office location (compulsory).


Salary
N70,000 &ndash; N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@thelawcrest.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Receptionist &ndash; Abuja&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates who meet the above requirements will be considered.",

Receptionist Job at the Law Crest LLP (“the Firm”




        
    

        
        The Law Crest LLP (“the Firm”) constantly provides legal, consulting and advisory services on energy matters in the upstream, midstream and downstream sectors of the energy industry. The Firm is at the fore-front of negotiating and drafting exploration and production contracts and joint ventures, obtaining necessary consents for acquisitions and transfers of interests as well as the creation of charges over oil and gas assets. We have also developed considerable expertise negotiating and preparing gas and petroleum products purchase and sales agreements and related contracts.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our Firm’s services are also engaged for the preparation and review of service agreements; agreements for lease of vessels, tugboats and house boats; agreements for the lease of tank farms; anchor handling tug supply (AHTS) agreements; joint venture agreements; through-put lease agreements and gas purchase agreements amongst others.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Suite 16 Extension, Jinifa Plaza Central Business District FCT, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

JJob Summary


	We are seeking a professional and personable Receptionist to serve as the first point of contact for our Abuja office.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing front desk operations, handling communications, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day office activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to clients and visitors in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and general inquiries
	Maintain the reception area, entire office to ensure it is clean, tidy and presentable
	Schedule appointments and manage meeting room bookings
	Handle incoming and outgoing correspondence and deliveries
	Provide administrative support to staff as required
	Maintain office records and basic documentation.


Requirements


	Minimum of an OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in any relevant field
	Proven experience in a receptionist or front desk role is an advantage
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications
	Professional appearance and attitude
	Must reside in close proximity to the Abuja office location (compulsory).


Salary
N70,000 – N80,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Receptionist – Abuja” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates who meet the above requirements will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a young, vibrant, and knowledgeable Facility Manager with strong experience in residential property management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the efficient operation, maintenance, and overall management of residential facilities, delivering high-quality services to residents while maintaining optimal asset value.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of residential facilities and estates
	Ensure all building systems (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) are functioning efficiently
	Manage preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Supervise and coordinate service providers, contractors, and vendors
	Handle resident complaints and ensure prompt resolution of issues
	Monitor facility budgets, track expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations
	Conduct routine inspections to ensure compliance with safety and quality standards
	Implement health, safety, and environmental policies within the facility
	Prepare regular reports on facility performance and maintenance activities
	Support occupancy management, move-ins, and move-outs where required


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in facility management, preferably in residential estates
	Strong technical knowledge of building systems and maintenance practices
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools


Key Competencies;


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	High level of energy and adaptability
	Strong customer service orientation
	Attention to detail and accountability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines


Preferred Attributes:


	Experience managing residential estates
	Familiarity with vendor and contract management
	Basic financial and budgeting knowledge


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;snwaneri@updcfm.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Facility Manager Job at UPDC Facility Management Limited




        
    

        
        UPDC Facility Management Limited is a leading facilities management company in Nigeria, providing comprehensive management, maintenance, and sustainable power solutions for residential, commercial, and corporate properties.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager
Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a young, vibrant, and knowledgeable Facility Manager with strong experience in residential property management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the efficient operation, maintenance, and overall management of residential facilities, delivering high-quality services to residents while maintaining optimal asset value.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of residential facilities and estates
	Ensure all building systems (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) are functioning efficiently
	Manage preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Supervise and coordinate service providers, contractors, and vendors
	Handle resident complaints and ensure prompt resolution of issues
	Monitor facility budgets, track expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations
	Conduct routine inspections to ensure compliance with safety and quality standards
	Implement health, safety, and environmental policies within the facility
	Prepare regular reports on facility performance and maintenance activities
	Support occupancy management, move-ins, and move-outs where required


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or related field
	2–5 years of experience in facility management, preferably in residential estates
	Strong technical knowledge of building systems and maintenance practices
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools


Key Competencies;


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	High level of energy and adaptability
	Strong customer service orientation
	Attention to detail and accountability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines


Preferred Attributes:


	Experience managing residential estates
	Familiarity with vendor and contract management
	Basic financial and budgeting knowledge


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Sales Representative",
  "description": "GWX is a 2nd, 3rd &amp; 4th party consumer-oriented supply chain management company with core competence in courier delivery service, haulage, logistics, air cargo services, service quality audit, third party verification, international businesses and customs clearing &amp; handling.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Manage inbound and outbound calls professionally, addressing customer queries, concerns, and providing accurate information.
	Strive for first-call resolution to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Build and maintain positive relationships with customers through effective communication.
	Identify and assess customer needs to provide appropriate solutions.
	Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex issues and escalate problems when necessary.
	Record and document customer interactions, issues, and resolutions accurately.
	Stay informed about the company&#39;s logistics services, pricing, and policies.
	Provide detailed information about products and services to customers.
	Keep abreast of industry trends and updates.
	Adhere to established call center protocols, procedures, and standards.
	Follow up on customer inquiries promptly and ensure timely resolution.
	Collaborate with team members to achieve departmental goals.
	Gather and document customer feedback to contribute to continuous improvement.
	Share insights on customer preferences and common issues with the team.
	Utilize call center software and technology to efficiently manage customer interactions.
	Accurately enter and update customer information in the database.
	Meet and exceed individual and team performance targets.
	&ensp;Regularly participate in training sessions to enhance skills and knowledge.
	Ensure business growth and profitability within assigned accounts.


Salary
N80,000 - N90,000 / month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@greaterwashingtonng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

Customer Sales Representative Job at GWX Limited




        
    

        
        GWX is a 2nd, 3rd & 4th party consumer-oriented supply chain management company with core competence in courier delivery service, haulage, logistics, air cargo services, service quality audit, third party verification, international businesses and customs clearing & handling.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Sales Representative

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage inbound and outbound calls professionally, addressing customer queries, concerns, and providing accurate information.
	Strive for first-call resolution to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Build and maintain positive relationships with customers through effective communication.
	Identify and assess customer needs to provide appropriate solutions.
	Collaborate with other departments to resolve complex issues and escalate problems when necessary.
	Record and document customer interactions, issues, and resolutions accurately.
	Stay informed about the company's logistics services, pricing, and policies.
	Provide detailed information about products and services to customers.
	Keep abreast of industry trends and updates.
	Adhere to established call center protocols, procedures, and standards.
	Follow up on customer inquiries promptly and ensure timely resolution.
	Collaborate with team members to achieve departmental goals.
	Gather and document customer feedback to contribute to continuous improvement.
	Share insights on customer preferences and common issues with the team.
	Utilize call center software and technology to efficiently manage customer interactions.
	Accurately enter and update customer information in the database.
	Meet and exceed individual and team performance targets.
	 Regularly participate in training sessions to enhance skills and knowledge.
	Ensure business growth and profitability within assigned accounts.


Salary
N80,000 - N90,000 / month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resource Generalist",
  "description": "GWX is a 2nd, 3rd &amp; 4th party consumer-oriented supply chain management company with core competence in courier delivery service, haulage, logistics, air cargo services, service quality audit, third party verification, international businesses and customs clearing &amp; handling.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Generalist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job&nbsp;Description


	GWX Logistics Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive HR Generalist to support the day-to-day management of our human resources operations.
	You will play a key role in driving recruitment, employee engagement, and HR processes to ensure a productive and compliant workplace.
	In this role, you will manage the full recruitment cycle for junior to mid-level roles, coordinate onboarding, and ensure a smooth integration of new hires.
	You will maintain accurate employee records, support performance management processes, and assist with payroll preparation in collaboration with the Finance team.
	You will also serve as a point of contact for employee relations matters, support disciplinary and grievance processes, and contribute to engagement initiatives.

Human Resource Generalist Job at GWX Limited




        
    

        
        GWX is a 2nd, 3rd & 4th party consumer-oriented supply chain management company with core competence in courier delivery service, haulage, logistics, air cargo services, service quality audit, third party verification, international businesses and customs clearing & handling.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Generalist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	GWX Logistics Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive HR Generalist to support the day-to-day management of our human resources operations.
	You will play a key role in driving recruitment, employee engagement, and HR processes to ensure a productive and compliant workplace.
	In this role, you will manage the full recruitment cycle for junior to mid-level roles, coordinate onboarding, and ensure a smooth integration of new hires.
	You will maintain accurate employee records, support performance management processes, and assist with payroll preparation in collaboration with the Finance team.
	You will also serve as a point of contact for employee relations matters, support disciplinary and grievance processes, and contribute to engagement initiatives.
	Additionally, you will manage exit processes and ensure compliance with labour laws and internal HR policies.
	This role is ideal for a well-organized professional with strong interpersonal skills and experience in handling multiple HR functions within a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
